title: rutaea rigida
intro: Rutaea rigida is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the citrus family, and is native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Rutaea rigida is believed to have several health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as the reduction of inflammation and pain. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to have a calming effect on the body and promote overall well-being.
